page_metadata.biotools__summary: Algorithm which represents the successful integration of a genome scale transcriptional regulatory network with a biochemically detailed metabolic network, bridging two important classes of systems biology models that have rarely been combined quantitatively.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Algorithm which represents the successful integration of a genome scale transcriptional regulatory network with a biochemically detailed metabolic network, bridging two important classes of systems biology models that have rarely been combined quantitatively.
